profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk engages in the financial technology and electronic commerce business in Indonesia. The company offers DavestPay mobile application for digital product purchase, billing payment, and ticket reservation. It also provides DoeKu, a platform that lends money in peer-to-peer lending market. In addition, the company engages in computer programming and consulting, finance consulting and insurance, guarantees, education, information, and financial services. PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2013 and is based in Makassar, Indonesia. PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt. Davest Investama Mandiri.
